codeReview.summary: The prior VAL-CROSS-003 blockers are cleared on current HEAD. Commit `cc920e2` adds a dedicated feature-owned proof bundle (`.factory/validation/mission-verification/mission-cross-flow-user-pause-continuation-proof.json`), a feature-owned flow artifact (`.factory/validation/mission-verification/user-testing/flows/pause-continuation-proof.json`), and focused automation in `test/interactionModeHotSwitch.test.ts` that proves normal-chat continuation reuses the same Mission engine session without any `droid.load_session` resume RPC. The proof still reuses the earlier Mission-GUI-TEST session `a901a190-5925-431e-8657-8db9bb502391` for the paused/resumed screenshots, but it no longer closes the feature via the superseded shared follow-up bundle or injected paused-state evidence alone: the current deliverable explicitly owns VAL-CROSS-003, cites real Mission-GUI-TEST continuity artifacts for the same session before and after normal chat, and pairs the paused-chat screenshot with real timeline evidence (`Worker paused` -> `Mission paused` -> `Mission run started`) plus the new same-session continuation test.

summary: Scrutiny passed. Current HEAD now contains a feature-owned VAL-CROSS-003 deliverable from commit `cc920e2`, and the combined evidence is genuinely same-session Mission-GUI-TEST proof for user pause -> continue via normal chat -> same Mission session continuity rather than a shared-bundle remap or injection-only claim.
